channel.title: Ai on instantiator.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on instantiator.dev

item.title: Say hello world and nothing else
item.description:
An unintentionally hilarious one-act play by Google’s Gemma 4.

Say Hello World and Nothing Else

Honestly, it’s a marvel that technology and statistical methods have come so far. It’s still quite amusing to see their internal monologues…

item.title: Experimental development with number-jam: a number plate obscurer
item.description: number-jam detects, tracks, and obscures vehicle number plates in video clips - and was an experiment in AI-assisted development.

item.title: Building AI into your application with Semantic Kernel
item.description: This is a quick guide to some of the features of the Semantic Kernel, a Software Development Kit that simplifies integration of language models into your own applications.
